extract: The Rotom Phone (Japanese: スマホロトム Smartphone Rotom) is a smartphone that is enhanced after being possessed by a Rotom. It is found in Galar in Pokémon Sword and Shield, as a Key Item in Paldea in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet, and in Lumiose City, Kalos in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It is popular amongst people across multiple Pokémon canons, and can host a multitude of functions and applications, including a Pokédex. The Paldean Pokédex application was developed by Jacq.
